name: modern-library-management-system
description: Re-engineered College Library Management System - Modern Full-Stack Web Application

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../playwright && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run preview"
